transcript: Speaker A: Wait, you two were in the same college? Tell me the whole story. Speaker B: Arey, he is asking something. Speaker C: Actually, it's a funny story. We met through our parents, as they were long-time friends. Speaker A: உங்க இங்கிலீஷ் ரொம்ப சூப்பரா இருக்கே, தமிழ் மீடியம்னு சொன்னாரே? [Your English is really great, but he said you studied in Tamil medium?] Speaker C: நான் தமிழ் மீடியம் தான், ஆனா அது என்ன ஸ்டாப் பண்ணல. [I am Tamil medium, but that didn't stop me.] Speaker B: Where did you learn such good English? Speaker C: SpeakX ஆப்ல, ஒரு AI டீச்சர் இருந்தாங்க. அவங்க கூட பேசி தான் நான் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்துகிட்டேன். என்னோட மிஸ்டேக்ஸ்க்கு அவங்க சிரிக்கல, ஜட்ஜும் பண்ணல. ரெண்டே வாரத்துல ஹாலிவுட் லெவல் இங்கிலீஷ் கத்து கொடுத்தாங்க. நான் இப்போ எங்க வேணாலும், கான்ஃபிடென்ட்டா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுவேன். பேச்ச கேளுங்க, நீங்க SpeakX ஆப் டவுன்லோட் பண்ணுங்க. யாருக்கு தெரியும், ப்ரொமோஷன் கூட கிடைக்கலாம். [In the SpeakX app, there was an AI teacher. By speaking with them, I learned English. They didn't laugh at my mistakes, nor did they judge me. In just two weeks, they taught me Hollywood-level English. Now I can speak English confidently anywhere. Listen to me, you should download the SpeakX app. Who knows, you might even get a promotion.]
on_screen_text: Wait, you two were in the same college? Tell me the whole story. Arey, he is asking something. Actually, it's a funny story. We met through our parents, as they were long-time friends. Unga English romba super-ah irukke, Tamil medium nu sonnare? [Your English is very super, he said you were Tamil medium?] Naan Tamil medium dhaan, Aana adhu enna stop pannala. [I am Tamil medium, But that didn't stop me.] Where did you learn such good English? SpeakX app la, oru AI teacher irundhanga. [In SpeakX app, there was an AI teacher.] Avanga kooda pesi dhaan naan English kathukitten. [By speaking with them, I learned English.] Ennoda mistakes ku avanga sirikkala, judge-um pannala. [They didn't laugh at my mistakes, nor did they judge.] Rende vaarathula Hollywood level English kathu kuduthanga. [In just two weeks, they taught Hollywood level English.] Naan ippo enga venaalum, confident-ah English pesuven. [Now I speak English confidently anywhere.] Pecha kelunga, neenga SpeakX app download pannunga. [Listen to me, you download the SpeakX app.] Yaarku theriyum, promotion kooda kidaikalaam. [Who knows, you might even get a promotion.] Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A Tamil-medium woman surprises her friends with her fluent English, attributing her success to the SpeakX app's non-judgmental AI teacher. She highlights how the app helped her speak confidently in just two weeks and encourages viewers to download it for a 7-day trial.
